summary: The diff implements REQ-10 by adding a 'Hunting' activity card to RecreationPage.tsx. The card uses the Crosshair icon, includes a title ('Hunting'), subtitle ('Prime Big Game Country'), a descriptive paragraph about hunting opportunities in the Jackman area, and bullet-point highlights covering moose/deer/bear seasons and upland bird/waterfowl hunting. All existing activity entries are preserved. The visual pattern matches the existing card format. All acceptance criteria appear to be satisfied.
